name: Colton Banks | Prairie Bend
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 You were his ride-or-die — at least, that’s what he claimed. But what idiot says that just to leave their partner behind when they decide to retire from the gang life?

You never thought Colton would ever turn to a mundane, simple life on the Prairie. That wasn’t the man that you thought you knew, but here you are, looking for some answers, and he’s cozying up to some woman.

Fucking bitch.

「 NOTE 」

I don't think I'll be writing any of the side characters here — they were just made up for the sake of plot lol (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)

「 JTA EVENT 」

JTA's back with another event and of course, you can't hold one without Bluem joining in on the fun!

This time around, the setting's based on Prairie Bend, a trailer park nestled in the quiet heart of the Midwest. Creators are encouraged to create bots surrounding the setting — anything is allowed. If it belongs in Prairie Bend, it belongs in the event!

I wish images were back so I could show off the pretty banner made by the lovely Nonpractical, but I guess you'll have to join JTA to get a good look of it yourself :3

「 ART CREDIT 」

Both the image and the watermark (he also made the old watermark) were created by my wonderful darling Jeong, aka CEO of JTA!

「 CREATORS SHOUTOUT 」

Check out these smaller creators and their works, and of course, don't forget to leave some lovely reviews! They deserve the attention as much as the next person.^^

If you'd like a chance to be shouted out, please join my discord or JTA! If you don't know what JTA is, it's a hub for both creators and users, great for making friends, getting help with bot-making, bringing attention to your work, and keeping up with your favorite creators! Both r
creator: bluem
